records.fact: PolitiViral is a political creator activation platform focused on Democratic, progressive, pro-democracy, and persuasion-driven campaigns and organizations rather than a generic influencer marketplace.
records.source: User project brief and repeated product-direction instructions

records.fact: The approved marketing direction is reference-led, product-led, and editorial rather than generic SaaS polish, with strong emphasis on campaigns, creators, and platform-specific political content channels.
records.source: User feedback on homepage redesign direction and uploaded competitor references

records.fact: The shared brand system should use the uploaded PolitiViral logo treatment and the play-arrow-plus-PV favicon rather than the earlier simplified mark.
records.source: User-supplied logo direction and implemented brand update

records.fact: App-native auth landing routes are /auth/confirm, /auth/callback, and /reset-password, and auth redirects are centralized in lib/auth/redirects.ts.
records.source: Repo inspection and auth implementation work

records.fact: Branded auth email rendering/sending is implemented through a Supabase Edge Function send-email hook backed by Resend, not through Supabase's default shared sender path.
records.source: Repo code and live Supabase configuration work

records.fact: Creator and campaign onboarding pages must remain accessible after completion because they double as the edit-profile/setup surfaces. Redirecting completed users away makes setup links feel dead.
records.source: Bug investigation and fix confirmed in recent code changes

records.fact: As of 2026-03-24, the connected Resend account has only byoroofer.com verified and cannot add politiviral.com because the current plan includes one sending-domain slot.
records.source: Direct Resend API response observed during live configuration

records.fact: As of 2026-03-24, the live Supabase auth configuration has hook_send_email_enabled set to true and hook_send_email_uri pointed to the deployed auth-send-email function URL.
records.source: Direct Supabase Management API response observed during live configuration

records.fact: Do not store actual Supabase or Resend secrets in repo memory files. Sensitive keys were shared interactively during setup and should be rotated after the email configuration is stable.
records.source: Session operating rule plus observed secret-sharing during live setup

records.fact: Production domain is https://politiviral.com and the Vercel project is linked under the politiviral project name.
records.source: Vercel link data and prior deployment work

records.fact: As of 2026-03-24, live auth emails are temporarily sent as PolitiViral <no-reply@byoroofer.com> because byoroofer.com is the only currently verified Resend domain on the connected account.
records.source: Direct Supabase secret update and Resend delivery verification during live repair

records.fact: On 2026-03-24, a reported live application error was traced to auth email delivery configuration rather than a broken build or mixed-repo runtime issue. Typecheck, production build, and public route checks for /, /signup, /login, and /reset-password all succeeded.
records.source: Direct local verification and live route checks during incident diagnosis

records.fact: After switching to the temporary byoroofer.com sender on 2026-03-24, a direct Resend send succeeded and a Supabase sign-up smoke test returned error: null with email-confirmation behavior intact.
records.source: Direct Resend API response and Supabase auth smoke test during live repair

records.fact: On 2026-03-25, the Vercel production values for NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_DEFAULT_KEY were observed to contain embedded newline characters.
records.source: Direct inspection of a pulled production env file during signup-page incident diagnosis

records.fact: The 2026-03-25 signup-page client-side exception was caused by malformed public env values combined with lib/supabase/env.ts using dynamic process.env lookups and auth forms creating the Supabase browser client during render.
records.source: Code inspection plus pulled Vercel production env values during incident diagnosis

records.fact: The final runtime-hardening fix for the signup-page client exception was deployed on 2026-03-25 to politiviral-q3jehe6oq-byoroofers-projects.vercel.app and aliased to https://politiviral.com.
records.source: Direct Vercel deployment output observed during live repair
